name: overstory-codex-runtime-selection
description: Overstory chooses the active agent runtime from .overstory/config.yaml runtime.default. Setting runtime.default to codex makes builder and coordinator resolve to the Codex runtime, and the Codex adapter intentionally treats manifest aliases sonnet/opus/haiku as 'use Codex CLI default model' rather than passing Claude model names through.

name: recover-branch-then-ignore-bun-artifacts
description: When recovering an existing implementation onto a merge branch, cherry-pick the known-good feature commit first, then add repo ignore rules for Bun install artifacts before validation so readiness checks are not obscured by generated files.

Root biome check includes .claude/settings.local.json; tests and typecheck can pass while lint fails on local formatter drift outside product code.
resolution: Exclude local machine config from root lint or keep .claude/settings.local.json biome-formatted before running repository-wide checks.

content: README.md should document the actual SCBS CLI command groups, Bun entrypoints, and that the current CLI runs on the in-memory adapter.

name: overstory-coordinator-cleanup
description: Clean up a leftover Overstory coordinator with ov stop coordinator, then tmux kill-session -t overstory-scbs-coordinator if the tmux session persists. Verify with ov status and tmux ls.

name: overstory-inspect-project-root
description: Overstory CLI inspection is project-root scoped in this repo: running ov inspect from ~ fails with 'unable to open database file', while running from /home/jarip/projects/scbs succeeds because the .overstory databases are resolved relative to the repository root.
A lead completed implementation and closed its Seed issue but only sent worker_done, not explicit merge_ready, leaving the coordinator unable to merge or safely finalize the batch.
resolution: Treat this as a coordinator handoff/protocol failure. Recover by obtaining merge_ready or manually recovering the branch; do not infer readiness from worker_done alone.

name: stale-branch-after-manual-recovery
description: If a worker branch was manually recovered onto master before protocol repair, verify master contains the feature commit and compare master..branch before issuing merge_ready; if the old branch only differs by stale state files, close recovery as already landed instead of merging the stale branch.
Codex-backed coordinator and lead agents can stop at an interactive prompt after completing a turn, leaving issues, groups, and worktrees unreconciled until an operator intervenes.
resolution: Track the stall as a runtime bug and manually close tracker state, stop stalled agents, and clean completed worktrees so the repo returns to a consistent state.

name: overstory-stranded-worktree-recovery
description: When Overstory prematurely closes or strands reopened SCBS work, verify tmux and worktrees before trusting ov status, reopen the Seed issue if needed, run branch-specific gates in the stranded worktree, then merge only the verified paths onto master before closing the issue and stopping coordinator.

content: Root Biome lint should exclude .claude/settings.local.json so repository lint does not fail on machine-local Claude formatting state.

name: overstory-remote-verification
description: After ov merge, verify upstream state with git ls-remote origin refs/heads/master because the local origin/master tracking ref can remain stale and should not be treated as proof of push success.
